== Notes for [[Item:Q98314|Q98314]] ==

Hizkiah ,

son of Shechaniah and nn to: nn

1) Shalom to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Hizkiya-ben-Shehanya/6000000000802429286?through=6000000000802583215

Hizkiah ,

son of Shechaniah and nn to: nn

1) Shalom to: nn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBBE5C171EFBBF89829A6488A4D52C5
geni:6000000000802429286

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
